title: Capability Token Wire Format (JWS Compact Serialization)
description: JWS Compact Serialization string: BASE64URL(protected_header).BASE64URL(payload).BASE64URL(signature). Three dot-separated base64url segments. The protected header MUST decode to capability-token-protected-header schema; payload MUST decode to capability-token-claims schema; signature segment MUST be exactly 86 base64url chars (64-byte raw R||S for ES256, no padding). Decoded views are validated separately (see MACHINE_READABLE_CONTRACTS.md §8, ADR-0003 §2.12). alg=none is FORBIDDEN.
